arguments.command:
# Create a minimal ELF shared library with the correct build ID
# We'll use a linker trick to set the build ID
BUILDID="4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801"

# Create a tiny ELF with Python that has the right build ID in its .note.gnu.build-id section
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import struct, sys

build_id_hex = "4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801"
build_id = bytes.fromhex(build_id_hex)

# Minimal ELF64 shared object
# ELF Header
e_ident = b'\x7fELF'  # magic
e_ident += b'\x02'     # 64-bit
e_ident += b'\x01'     # little-endian
e_ident += b'\x01'     # ELF version
e_ident += b'\x00'     # OS/ABI
e_ident += b'\x00' * 8  # padding

ehdr_size = 64
phdr_size = 56
# We need one PT_NOTE program header for the build ID
num_phdrs = 1
note_offset = ehdr_size + phdr_size * num_phdrs

# Build the note section: .note.gnu.build-id
# Note header: namesz(4) + descsz(4) + type(4) + name + padding + desc + padding
name = b'GNU\x00'
namesz = len(name)
descsz = len(build_id)
note_type = 3  # NT_GNU_BUILD_ID
# Align name and desc to 4 bytes
name_pad = (4 - namesz % 4) % 4
desc_pad = (4 - descsz % 4) % 4
note_data = struct.pack('<III', namesz, descsz, note_type)
note_data += name + b'\x00' * name_pad
note_data += build_id + b'\x00' * desc_pad

total_size = note_offset + len(note_data)

# ELF header
ehdr = e_ident
ehdr += struct.pack('<H', 3)        # e_type: ET_DYN (shared object)
ehdr += struct.pack('<H', 183)      # e_machine: EM_AARCH64
ehdr += struct.pack('<I', 1)        # e_version
ehdr += struct.pack('<Q', 0)        # e_entry
ehdr += struct.pack('<Q', ehdr_size) # e_phoff
ehdr += struct.pack('<Q', 0)        # e_shoff
ehdr += struct.pack('<I', 0)        # e_flags
ehdr += struct.pack('<H', ehdr_size) # e_ehsize
ehdr += struct.pack('<H', phdr_size) # e_phentsize
ehdr += struct.pack('<H', num_phdrs) # e_phnum
ehdr += struct.pack('<H', 64)       # e_shentsize
ehdr += struct.pack('<H', 0)        # e_shnum
ehdr += struct.pack('<H', 0)        # e_shstrndx

# Program header for PT_NOTE
phdr = struct.pack('<I', 4)          # p_type: PT_NOTE
phdr += struct.pack('<I', 4)         # p_flags: PF_R
phdr += struct.pack('<Q', note_offset) # p_offset
phdr += struct.pack('<Q', note_offset) # p_vaddr
phdr += struct.pack('<Q', note_offset) # p_paddr
phdr += struct.pack('<Q', len(note_data)) # p_filesz
phdr += struct.pack('<Q', len(note_data)) # p_memsz
phdr += struct.pack('<Q', 4)         # p_align

with open('/tmp/symbols/libcoreclr.so', 'wb') as f:
    f.write(ehdr + phdr + note_data)

print(f"Created minimal ELF with build ID: {build_id_hex}")
print(f"File size: {total_size} bytes")
PYEOF

file /tmp/symbols/libcoreclr.so
readelf -n /tmp/symbols/libcoreclr.so 2>/dev/null || eu-readelf -n /tmp/symbols/libcoreclr.so 2>/dev/null
